description_long: This humanoid robot features a spherical head with a single large, circular eye-like sensor at its center, surrounded by a weathered, rusty metallic surface with greenish patina. The torso is composed of two stacked, rounded segments, separated by a green horizontal band, and connected to thin, jointed arms and legs. The arms are slender rods with visible elbow joints and end in claw-like hands with three articulated fingers each. The legs are similarly thin, with knee joints and broad, wedge-shaped feet, all mounted on a square platform base. The robot's overall appearance is utilitarian and industrial, with exposed mechanical joints and a worn, aged finish. Its design suggests mobility and dexterity, suitable for urban environments where interaction with objects and people is required.
description: A weathered, humanoid robot with a spherical head, single central eye, thin articulated limbs, and claw-like hands, finished in rusty metal with green patina.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's single large eye, symmetrical arms and legs, and claw-like hands, highlighting the green patina and weathered metal surface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the robot's rounded torso segments, thin limbs, and the depth of its wedge-shaped feet, emphasizing the layered body structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the spherical head and torso, the alignment of the arms and legs, and the mechanical joints, with less detail on the face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the same layered torso and limb articulation as view 1, with a clear profile of the head and the robot's stance.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent at the elbows and hanging down, legs straight and feet flat on the base, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated metallic panels with a weathered, industrial finish and green patina.
attribute_facial_features: Face consists of a single large, circular eye-like sensor in the center of the spherical head; no visible mouth, nose, or expressive features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge or rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have three articulated fingers each; limbs appear rigid but jointed for movement.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Single large eye-like sensor in the center of the head; no other visible sensors.
